# Escrivint coses (blog.carlesjulia.com)

This site is a technical blog by Carles Julià.

## Canonical site
- https://blog.carlesjulia.com/

## Sitemaps & feeds
- Sitemap: https://blog.carlesjulia.com/sitemap.xml
- Atom: https://blog.carlesjulia.com/feeds/all.atom.xml
- RSS: https://blog.carlesjulia.com/feeds/all.rss.xml

## LLM-friendly Markdown exports (source markdown)
These files are the original source Markdown (copied 1:1, including frontmatter).

- Index (Catalan): https://blog.carlesjulia.com/llm/ca/
- Index (English): https://blog.carlesjulia.com/llm/en/

## Notes
- Content languages: ca, en
- If you cite content, prefer the canonical HTML URLs under https://blog.carlesjulia.com/
